cards.title: [SETUP-1] Initialize .NET Web API Project
cards.description: Create the .NET Web API solution, install all NuGet packages (EF Core, Npgsql, JWT Bearer, BCrypt, AutoMapper), configure appsettings.json with DB connection string and JWT settings, enable CORS for Vite dev server (port 5173), remove default WeatherForecast boilerplate.

cards.title: [SETUP-2] Initialize React + Vite + TypeScript Frontend
cards.description: Scaffold the React frontend with Vite and TypeScript. Install axios, react-router-dom, TanStack Query. Set up folder structure (api/, components/, pages/, context/, hooks/, types/, utils/). Create .env with VITE_API_URL.
checklist: Set up base axios instance with auth header interceptor

cards.title: [SETUP-3] PostgreSQL + Entity Framework Core Setup
cards.description: Create AppDbContext with all DbSets. Register in Program.cs. Run initial migration. Seed a default Admin user (with BCrypt-hashed password).
checklist: Create all entity model classes (User, Document, DocumentType, DocumentVersion, ApprovalAction, Notification, AuditLog)
Register DbContext in Program.cs with Npgsql provider
Seed default Admin user with hashed password

cards.title: [SETUP-4] Configure JWT Authentication Middleware
cards.description: Add JWT Bearer authentication to Program.cs with correct TokenValidationParameters. Create JwtService.cs to generate tokens with user ID, email, and role as claims. This is the highest-risk task — read the docs carefully.
checklist: Set ValidateIssuer = true + ValidIssuer from config
Set ValidateAudience = true + ValidAudience from config
Create JwtService.cs with GenerateToken(User user) method
Embed ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier, ClaimTypes.Email, ClaimTypes.Role in token
Register JwtService as scoped in DI

cards.title: [AUTH-1] Register & Login API Endpoints
cards.description: Build AuthController with POST /api/auth/register and POST /api/auth/login. Also GET /api/auth/me for fetching current user from JWT. Use BCrypt for password hashing. Return JWT + user info on success.
checklist: POST /api/auth/register — hash password, save user, return JWT
POST /api/auth/login — verify BCrypt hash, return JWT
GET /api/auth/me — return current user info from claims
Return 401 on bad credentials (not 404 — don't reveal email existence)

cards.title: [AUTH-2] Role-Based Authorization on Endpoints
cards.description: Apply [Authorize] and [Authorize(Roles = "...")] attributes to all controllers and actions that require protection. Extract current user ID from claims in controllers where needed.
checklist: Add [Authorize] to all controllers that need auth
Use User.FindFirst(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier) to get current user ID
Test all role restrictions with Postman/Swagger

cards.title: [AUTH-3] Frontend Auth Context + Protected Routes
cards.description: Create AuthContext.tsx storing JWT in localStorage, decode token payload (role, userId, fullName). Build ProtectedRoute component that checks auth and role, redirecting to /login if unauthorized. After login, redirect to role-specific dashboard.
checklist: Create AuthContext.tsx with login(), logout(), user state
Store JWT in localStorage on login
Decode JWT payload using jwt-decode to extract role/userId
Set up react-router-dom routes with role guards
Redirect /login → role dashboard after successful login
Add axios interceptor to attach Authorization: Bearer <token> header

cards.title: [DOCTYPE-1] Document Type CRUD API
cards.description: Full CRUD for DocumentType entity. Admin only. Endpoints: GET /api/document-types, POST, PUT/{id}, DELETE/{id}.
checklist: DELETE /api/document-types/{id} — delete (check no documents use it first)

cards.title: [DOCTYPE-2] Document Type Management UI
cards.description: Admin UI for managing document types. Table with Name, Description. Create/edit modal. Confirm on delete.
checklist: Hook into API with TanStack Query (useQuery + useMutation)

cards.title: [DOC-1] Submit Document API
cards.description: POST /api/documents. Employee submits a new document. Server creates Document (status=PendingApproval), DocumentVersion (v1), AuditLog entry, and Notifications for all Approvers — all in one transaction.
checklist: Create Document record with Status=PendingApproval, CurrentVersion=1
Create DocumentVersion record (version 1, content from request)
Fetch all Approver users and create Notification for each
Wrap all DB writes in a transaction

cards.title: [DOC-2] Get My Documents API
cards.description: GET /api/documents/my — returns documents submitted by the authenticated employee with current status.
checklist: Filter documents by SubmittedById = current user
Include latest ApprovalAction comment if any
Return in descending order by UpdatedAt

cards.title: [DOC-3] Resubmit After Changes Requested
cards.description: PUT /api/documents/{id}/resubmit. Employee revises and resubmits a document that is in ChangesRequested status. Creates new DocumentVersion, resets status to PendingApproval.
checklist: Validate document belongs to current user
Validate document status is ChangesRequested (return 400 otherwise)
Create new DocumentVersion record with updated content

cards.title: [DOC-4] Employee Dashboard UI
cards.description: Employee landing page after login. Table/list of submitted documents with color-coded status badges. New Document button. Click row → Document Detail.
checklist: DocumentsTable.tsx with columns: Title, Type, Status, Submitted, Last Updated

cards.title: [DOC-5] Document Submission Form UI
cards.description: Form page for submitting a new document. Fields: Title, Description, DocumentType (dropdown from API), Content (textarea). On submit, POST to API and redirect to dashboard.
checklist: Show success message / redirect on submit
Show error message on API failure

cards.title: [DOC-6] Document Detail Page (Employee View)
cards.description: Shows full document info, approval history timeline, version history list. If status is ChangesRequested, show resubmit form with textarea for revised content.
checklist: Fetch document by ID (include approval actions + versions)
ApprovalTimeline.tsx component (list of actions with actor + date + comment)
VersionHistory.tsx component (list versions, click to view content)

cards.title: [APPROVAL-1] Get Documents Pending Review API
cards.description: GET /api/documents/pending — returns all documents with status PendingApproval, available to authenticated Approvers.
checklist: Include submitter name, document type, submission date

cards.title: [APPROVAL-2] Act on Document API
cards.description: POST /api/documents/{id}/action. Approver submits an action (Approved/Rejected/ChangesRequested) with a comment. Updates document status, creates ApprovalAction record, writes AuditLog, notifies submitter.
checklist: Return 400 if trying to act on already-terminal document

cards.title: [APPROVAL-3] Approver Dashboard UI
cards.description: Approver landing page. Two tabs: Pending (actionable) and Reviewed (history). Document cards with submitter, type, date. Click → document detail.

cards.title: [APPROVAL-4] Document Detail Page (Approver View)
cards.description: Full document view for Approvers. Shows content, version history, comment/action history. Action panel with Approve/Reject/Request Changes buttons + comment textarea. Buttons disabled for non-pending documents.
checklist: Disable action panel if status !== PendingApproval

cards.title: [ADMIN-1] User Management API
cards.description: Full CRUD for User entity. Admin only. Soft delete (set IsActive=false). Endpoints: GET /api/admin/users, POST, PUT/{id}, DELETE/{id}.
checklist: GET — list all users with role + department
DELETE — soft delete (IsActive = false, not DB delete)

cards.title: [ADMIN-2] View All Documents API
cards.description: GET /api/admin/documents with optional filters: status, documentTypeId, submittedBy. Returns full document list for Admin oversight.
checklist: Build filterable query using EF Core Where() chains
Include submitter name, document type, current status

cards.title: [ADMIN-3] Audit Log API
cards.description: GET /api/admin/audit-logs with filters for documentId, userId, date range. Returns full action history across the system.
checklist: Include actor name, document title, action, timestamp

cards.title: [ADMIN-4] Analytics API
cards.description: GET /api/admin/analytics. Returns aggregated stats: total documents, breakdown by status, breakdown by document type, average approval time, documents submitted this month.
checklist: Count grouped by DocumentTypeId (join type name)
Documents submitted in current calendar month
Avg time from PendingApproval to terminal status (Approved/Rejected)

cards.title: [ADMIN-5] Admin Dashboard UI
cards.description: Admin landing page with stat cards (total docs, pending, approved this month, avg approval time), status breakdown chart, document type chart, recent activity feed.
checklist: PieChart or BarChart for status breakdown using recharts

cards.title: [ADMIN-6] User Management UI
cards.description: Admin UI for managing users. Table with Name, Email, Role badge, Department, Active status. Create/edit modal. Deactivate button.

cards.title: [ADMIN-7] Admin All Documents View UI
cards.description: Full documents table for Admin with filters (by status, type, submitter). Read-only view — Admin doesn't act on documents, just oversees.
checklist: Filter bar: status dropdown, type dropdown, user search
Table: Title, Type, Submitter, Status, Last Updated
Click row → view-only document detail (reuse components)

cards.title: [NOTIF-1] Notifications API
cards.description: GET /api/notifications for current user. PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read. PUT /api/notifications/read-all. Used by all roles.
checklist: GET — user's notifications ordered by CreatedAt desc
Include unread count in response header or separate endpoint

cards.title: [NOTIF-2] Notification Bell UI
cards.description: Bell icon in navbar showing unread count. Dropdown listing recent notifications with message and relative time. Click navigates to relevant document.
checklist: Badge with unread count (red dot or number)
Navigate to /employee/documents/:id or /approver/documents/:id based on role
Poll notifications every 30 seconds (or use interval in useEffect)

cards.title: [VERSION-1] Document Version History API
cards.description: GET /api/documents/{id}/versions — returns all DocumentVersion records for a given document, ordered by version number.
checklist: Return: VersionNumber, Content, SubmittedById, SubmitterName, CreatedAt, ChangeNote
Accessible by document owner, any Approver, and Admin

cards.title: [VERSION-2] Version History UI Component
cards.description: VersionHistory.tsx reusable component used inside Document Detail pages for all roles. Lists all versions with submitter and date. Clicking a version shows its content in a modal/panel.
checklist: Click version → ViewVersionModal.tsx showing that version's content (read-only)

cards.title: [TEST-1] End-to-End Workflow Test
cards.description: Manually walk through the full workflow: Employee submits → Approver requests changes → Employee resubmits → Approver approves. Verify all status changes, notifications, and audit log entries are correct.
checklist: Create test users: 1 Employee, 1 Approver, 1 Admin
Employee submits document → check status = PendingApproval
Approver sees it in pending list

cards.title: [TEST-2] UI Polish Pass
cards.description: Final pass on UI: consistent status colors across all views, loading spinners on all async operations, error messages on failed API calls, empty state messages (e.g. 'No documents yet'), mobile-responsive layout check.
checklist: Loading state on all data fetches
Error boundaries / toast notifications on API errors
